The '''storm beasts''' were large reptilian creatures twisted by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Malachor V]]. They had several abilities, including being able to emit a wave of destructive sonic energy and enhanced strength.<ref name="JATM" />

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Storm_beast_kotor2.jpg|thumb|left|A storm beast on Malachor V]]
Storm Beasts were hulking monstrosities that roamed the desolated surface of Malachor V. They were savage [[Reptile|reptilian]] predators that generally stood around 2 metres tall,<ref name="JATM" /> even though a larger variant known as greater storm beast also existed.<ref name="TSL" />

They possessed vicious demeanours and abilities that had been augmented by the dark side of the force. They were also capable of emitting destructive sonic energy.<ref name="JATM" />

They tended to be solitary except during mating seasons. Outside of that timeframe, banding more than one of them together usually resulted in them fighting until only one remained alive.<ref name="JATM" />

==History==
[[File:StormBeastMalachor-K2.jpg|thumb|right|A greater storm beast|195x195px]]
Many historians believed that originally, they were natural creatures at the top of the food chain, until the [[Trayus Academy]] was constructed. The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] used the dark side to turn the creatures into menacing beasts, who continued to be immersed in it well after the Sith left the planet, along with the other creatures of their ecosystem. Over time, the storm beasts eradicated competing predators, leaving themselves as the sole masters of their world.<ref name="JATM" />

The storm beasts were possibly the only native species of Malachor V to survive after the [[Jedi Civil War]], since they were the only species found living on the world's surface.<ref name="JATM" /> During the [[First Jedi Purge]], storm beasts were the only visible beings that lived on the surface of Malachor V aside from the inhabitants of the [[Trayus Academy]].<ref name="TSL" />

Following the [[Battle of Malachor|second activation]] of the [[Mass Shadow Generator/Legends|Mass Shadow Generator]], which devastated the planet even further than it already was, many storm beasts died, although some lived on, able to sustainably live in what remained of Malachor's atmosphere.<ref name="Legacy of Malachor">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Bioanalysis|Legacy of Malachor}}</ref>
